title: Python-vs-Go route parity fixture harness
scope: Reusable fixture harness for future Go-primary route promotion gates. The harness can run a declared route against Flask and a Go HTTP target, then compare status, JSON shape, DB mutation, and file mutation in a fixed diff format.

target_requirements: Go target uses HTTP base URL
File snapshots are root-scoped under the target data dir

diff_format.db_mutation: present when table before/after deltas differ
diff_format.file_mutation: present when file tree before/after deltas differ

boundaries: This harness does not authorize any live route promotion.
Mutation fixtures must use copied DB/data dirs unless a later live gate explicitly approves production data.
Volatile timestamp fields are normalized only when fixture normalize_json_keys declares them.
